item_specifications.special_feature: Cooling, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Washable, Water Resistant

about_item: Human-grade dog bed: The orthopedic dog bed features a 6" thick base and a 5" bolster with memory foam filling, 3-layer construction 4-inch base (30D) + 1" memory foam + 1" eggshell foam infused with cooling gel. Creating a raised dog bed of 11 inches.

Vet Approved: Our dog beds cradle the bone structure posture, helping to relieve pressure, ease arthritis pain, joint inflammation, and other ailments, especially beneficial for older dogs and larger breeds.
Key features: Cooling dog bed, foam remains stable in warm or cold climates. Waterproof dog bed comes with 2 covers, an inner and an outer, both washable and removable.
Size: Meticulously sized for all breeds, cat, puppy to giant jumbo dogs, small dog bed medium size dog bed large sized dog bed, & XL dog bed we have you all covered.
Note: Upon initial unboxing the foam may appear compressed. Rest assured that it will regain its original shape within 24-72 hours.

summary.text: Customers find this dog bed to be a beautiful high-quality item with super soft material that feels like a mattress, featuring thick memory foam layers and excellent value for half the price. They appreciate its size, with one customer noting it's big enough for two dogs to enjoy together, and they like its appearance, with one mentioning its gorgeous emerald green color. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some say it should last a long time, others report seams ripping.

authors_reviews.title: Great bed, nicely designed & very well made; comfortable & so supportive. Got 2, dogs love them!
authors_reviews.text: This is a great dog bed. I ordered two of them in the medium size for our 35# & 40# pups. I previously purchased one in another style (the one with faux leather sides & a bolster at one end) so I knew to expect a nice design + quality of materials & construction.Our dogs have those snuggly cave style dog beds with a sherpa lining that they can crawl into for winter, but our pups don't really enjoy sleeping on top of them during the warm weather. Plus, they do take up a lot of room. So, I usually put them away and try to find something else that will work, as one of our dogs has a definite need for an orthopedic bed.I thought this sofa style would be perfect for them. And it is. The wrap around bolster gives the bed a cozy feeling, and they enjoy resting their heads on it. The bed is thick and cushiony but not so high that it is hard for them to jump in. The velvety cover is soft and plush.The packaging is excellent. The bed is packed compactly into a sturdy but very nice product box that would be suitable for gifting. This box is packed into one of those made-to-fit outer boxes. The inner part of the bed is vacuum sealed in thick, durable plastic and consists of two parts, each with a zippered inner cover that can be removed for laundering; the bolster and the core. The outer velvety cover is a single piece with sections and can also be removed and washed.Once the vacuum seal is opened, the core and bolster start to expand right away. I find it easier to go ahead and assemble the bed right away and then sort of fluff it into place and let it attain its full size. The cover has two zippers. One for the bolster that runs 3/4 of the way around the bed and a second one for the core that opens 1/2 around the bed like an L shape. I put it together this way, and it only took a few minutes:First, I opened up the L-shaped zipper right at the seam between the bottom of the cover (with the little silicone grips) and the base. I think it is worth taking an extra minute or two to zip it closed slowly while evening out the core and making sure none of the fabric of the inner lining gets caught in the zipper. Simple enough.Next, I oriented the bolster with the center right in front of me and the ends curving away from me at each side. I opened up the zipper which is right at the seam between the part the pet will be lying on and the bolster. Look for the red stitching along the corner seams. Stuff each end of the bolster into the corresponding pocket and then start zipping (slowly) while pressing the rest of the bolster into place while also making sure to line up the red seams with the corners. The bolster is a bit bulky so it does take a little patience to do this. Ta-daah! Done.Writing this took a lot longer than just doing it.The beds look very nice in our living room. I did like the look of the beds with the faux leather trim, but I decided these plain ones would do just as well, and save me a little money in the process. I'm happy with my choice. The shape means they don't take up too much space and the grey velvet is a nice match to my couches. The beds have a very substantial feel and there is a handle on one side to make carrying them easy. The core is thick and cushiony + very supportive. No danger of our dogs sinking down almost to the floor when sleeping in these beds! The fabric of the outer cover looks very nice and feels quite durable. The zippers are sturdy and the zipper tab can be tucked in to the fold of fabric.The price seems very reasonable, and I wouldn't hesitate to buy from this brand again. I've tried many dog beds over the years, and it truly is hard to find just the right one that is even close to being affordable. These beds are so thoughtfully designed and our dogs seem to like them + they are holding up very well (our dogs are past the chewing stage, thank goodness).
authors_reviews.author: SuLu

authors_reviews.title: Paws Approved! Human Owners Approved Too❣️
authors_reviews.text: This is my Amazon review for the NOAH & PAW Giant Dog Bed XXL, 55x45x11 Inch, Orthopedic Dog Beds, Eggshell Memory Foam Infused with Cooling Gel, Inner Cover, Waterproof, Machine Washable (Velvet Sofa Collection).Big paws approved! Human approved too! This is a human comfort type of dog bed, and it is fantastic because it’s what our most loyal and protective pets deserve - our best! Overstuffed pillow arms, near human sized actual sofa bed, heck this is an all around good quality pet bed, and it’s sold at an affordable price of $85.00. It is the best quality dog bed for my Blue-tick Coonhound to date with eleven inches of total comfort padding (including the arm pads). It has a strong and easy to use zipper that I could zip with one hand albeit very slowly, lol. Point is, the zipper is strong and solid enough to zip and withstand the dogs jumping in and out their beds.Folks, I couldn’t be happier with the quality of this dog bed. There are lots of good dog beds, but this is the first time I have seen eleven inches of pure comfort for our dogs and wrapped in velvety softness to boot! Great job on this one. The only picture without our dog in his bed is when we first stuffed it, and boy howdy, our dog tried his best for days to get to it. He just couldn’t reach it, lol. We let it set for the full 72 hours. The size of this bed is fantastic, and the total bed cover including the attached arm section is removable and washable. Thanks, Amazon.
authors_reviews.author: Jat

authors_reviews.title: Worth every penny
authors_reviews.text: Finally a bed large enough and with plenty of cushion! I searched forever and after multiple beds/returns, contemplating expensive beds I decided to try this one. So glad I did, it feels amazing and my dog who only likes to sleep in my bed loved it instantly! Not hard to put together if you lay everything out first and see what you’re working with. Great price too and amazing quality.
authors_reviews.author: AM1205

authors_reviews.title: Quality is Profection!
authors_reviews.text: I’m honestly blown away by this bed. The packaging was beautiful and protective, and when I opened it the quality was obvious. Thick, supportive, and the fabric feels durable but soft.I have 2 dogs and only bought one size Large to test it out. They both love it so much they take turns, I caught them curled up together on it. If that’s not a 5-star review from the dogs themselves, I don’t know what is.If you’re on the fence, buy it. I’m ordering a second one now so they don’t have to share.
authors_reviews.author: Carlo

authors_reviews.title: VERY Nice Dog Bed - Worth the cost and then some!!
authors_reviews.text: I really LOVED this dog bed. I did everything I could to get my dog to use it. I eve got on it and had my dog lay on it wiith me. She just wouldn't use it on her own. When I layed on it, I felt it was more comfortable than my couch! The covers very made to last and are very durable. It also had a very nice zipper. Not some cheesy thing to barely hold it together. This bed can be taken apart and the outside parts, washed. The size was perfect for my 2 dogs and then some. You can't go wrong with this company. I did hsave a conversation with the company and all they want is for you and your dog to be happy. That's probably why they made such a nice dog bed that will last for years to come! Even the price was reasonable!!
authors_reviews.author: Joseph C
